name: io.github.lunacompsia-oss/mcp-server-deps
description: Give AI assistants real-time dependency intelligence: outdated packages, vulnerabilities, dependency trees, and package health metrics

tools.name: check_outdated
tools.description: Find outdated dependencies in your package.json — shows current vs latest versions with update type classification

tools.name: check_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Check a package for known security vulnerabilities via OSV.dev

tools.name: get_dependency_tree
tools.description: Visualize recursive dependency trees with circular dependency detection

tools.name: get_package_health
tools.description: Package health metrics: downloads, maintainers, freshness, GitHub stars, actionable warnings

environment_variables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: GitHub personal access token for higher API rate limits (optional)
